allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('targets:',d['n_targets'],d.get\('targets'\)\); print\('top edge:',d['edges'][0] if d['edges'] else None\); print\('num edges:',len\(d['edges']\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('class:',d['drug_class'],'| scaffold:',d['scaffold_family']\); print\('groups:',d['functional_groups']\); print\('top similar:',d['similar_drugs'][:2]\); print\('top disease profile:',d['disease_profiles'][:2]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('n_known:',d['n_known'],'n_overlap:',d['n_overlap']\); print\('overlap drugs:',d['overlap_drugs']\); print\('top3 computed:',[\(r['drug_name'],r['overlap']\) for r in d['computed_ranking'][:3]]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('cols present in row 0:', list\(d['edges'][0].keys\(\)\)\)")
